sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41839" key="e)porga/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐποργάω</orth>, in form <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐποργῶσαι· μηνιῶσαι,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
